recipe.title: Saturday: Ground Turkey Taco Soup
ingredients: **Toppings:** diced avocado, sour cream, shredded cheese, cilantro, lime wedges, tortilla chips
steps: In a skillet, brown turkey with onion in olive oil. Add garlic and taco seasoning, cook 1 minute. Drain excess fat.
Transfer to slow cooker. Add black beans, corn, diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, and chicken broth. Stir well.
Cover and cook on **Low 4–6 hours** (or High 2–3 hours).
Taste and adjust salt. Serve in bowls with toppings bar on the side.
